name: latexview
description: Codex workflows and tools for inspecting LaTeX PDFs with latexview.

interface.shortDescription: Preview, search, jump, and capture LaTeX PDFs.
interface.longDescription: latexview gives Codex direct tools for serving LaTeX PDFs in a browser, finding rendered text, jumping to pages, and capturing crisp WebP page images.
defaultPrompt: Find this rendered text in the PDF.
Capture this PDF page as WebP.
